mapper.select: -- 활성 사업본부 선택 목록을 조회한다. SELECT d.department_id, d.code, d.name FROM departments d WHERE d.is_active = TRUE ORDER BY d.display_order, d.department_id
-- 사업본부 코드 기준으로 활성 사업본부를 조회한다. SELECT d.department_id, d.code, d.name FROM departments d WHERE d.code = #{departmentCode} AND d.is_active = TRUE

-- 사업본부별 활성 수주확률 단계를 조회한다. SELECT ps.probability_stage_id, ps.department_id, ps.probability, ps.name, ps.description, ps.is_confirmed_revenue, ps.display_order, ps.is_active FROM probability_stages ps WHERE ps.department_id = #{departmentId} AND ps.is_active = TRUE ORDER BY ps.display_order, ps.probability
-- 사업본부별 활성 수주확률 단계 ID 목록을 조회한다. SELECT ps.probability_stage_id FROM probability_stages ps WHERE ps.department_id = #{departmentId} AND ps.is_active = TRUE ORDER BY ps.display_order, ps.probability
-- 특정 수주확률 단계를 사용하는 영업 건수를 조회한다. SELECT COUNT(o.opportunity_id) FROM opportunities o WHERE o.probability_stage_id = #{probabilityStageId}
mapper.insert: -- 신규 수주확률 단계를 등록한다. INSERT INTO probability_stages ( department_id, probability, name, description, is_confirmed_revenue, display_order, is_active ) VALUES ( #{departmentId}, #{probability}, #{name}, #{description}, #{confirmedRevenue}, #{displayOrder}, TRUE )
mapper.update: -- 수주확률 단계 설정을 수정하고 활성 상태로 복구한다. UPDATE probability_stages SET probability = #{probability}, name = #{name}, description = #{description}, is_confirmed_revenue = #{confirmedRevenue}, display_order = #{displayOrder}, is_active = TRUE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE probability_stage_id = #{probabilityStageId} AND department_id = #{departmentId}
-- 수주확률 단계를 비활성화한다. UPDATE probability_stages SET is_active = FALSE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE probability_stage_id = #{probabilityStageId}
